common.footer_bio: Self-taught full-stack developer with a background in solar engineering, dedicated to building fast, reliable, and premium web experiences.

home.hero_subtitle: Web Developer & Renewable Energy Engineer specializing in building pixel-perfect, secure, and highly-optimized modern web applications.
home.precision_desc: Approaching software debugging with the clinical precision of hardware diagnostics.
home.energy_desc: Designing high-performance web systems with optimal efficiency and resource usage.
home.strengths_desc: A unique fusion of systematic physical engineering discipline and modern full-stack development.
home.strengths_card_desc_0: My background in solar engineering trained me to approach complex problems systematically. In physical electrical grids, troubleshooting requires absolute precision; I apply that exact same methodical diagnostics flow to debugging code and resolving backend logic bottlenecks.
home.strengths_card_desc_1: Without a formal computer science degree, I learned to code by reading documentation, parsing source code, and building real-world software from scratch. This self-reliance has given me the ability to quickly master new technologies and adapt to any stack with ease.
home.strengths_card_desc_2: In solar tech, one misaligned connection can compromise an entire array. I bring this level of perfectionism to software engineering, ensuring pixel-perfect layout spacing, type-safe robust codebases, clean components, and highly optimized web assets.
home.strengths_card_desc_3: The tech industry never stands still, and neither do I. I dedicate time every single day to researching modern development patterns, mastering state management, and playing with new tools. I treat learning as a professional lifestyle.
home.strengths_card_desc_4: A truly premium application must be as intuitive as it is powerful. I believe in minimalism, readable typography, generous white space, and subtle, purposeful micro-animations that guide users naturally without visual clutter.

about.title: MY JOURNEY
about.subtitle: From solar engineering to full-stack software development—a story of self-taught learning and practical problem solving.
about.journey_description: From mounting physical solar arrays on the hot roofs of renewable infrastructure, to engineering clean responsive algorithms behind sleek web interfaces. Abdul's journey is one of non-traditional excellence.
about.elite_dev_desc: Dedicated to functional state patterns, crisp micro-interactions, and pristine Tailwind designs.
about.solar_spec_desc: A certified technician with experience building reliable physical off-grid systems and hybrid load layouts.
